title: Supabase sign-in shows authenticated main shell after valid credentials submission
description: Verifies a user can open the sign-in card, enter credentials, submit, and land in the authenticated main shell when auth is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in card from the brand area when shown
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit credentials
Verify the authenticated main shell is displayed

title: Supabase sign-in shows error state for invalid credentials
description: Verifies submitting invalid credentials results in an auth or validation error visible in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in card from the brand area when shown
Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit credentials
Verify a validation or authentication error message is visible

title: Local storage mode: continue without Supabase and reach main shell
description: Verifies the user can continue with local storage when Supabase is not configured and reach the main shell in local mode.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose Continue with local storage when Supabase is not configured
Verify the main shell is displayed
Verify the UI indicates local mode is active

title: Sign-in form prevents submission when email is missing
description: Verifies client-side validation prevents submitting credentials when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in card from the brand area when shown
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit credentials
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Sign-in form prevents submission when password is missing
description: Verifies client-side validation prevents submitting credentials when password is not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in card from the brand area when shown
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Submit credentials
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Open sign-in card reveals email/password inputs
description: Verifies that opening the sign-in card exposes the expected credential entry fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the sign-in card from the brand area when shown
Verify the email field is displayed
Verify the password field is displayed

title: Create a call record with required + optional fields and custom date/time
description: Verifies a call can be logged with required fields, optional fields, and adjusted date/time, and then appears in the list for the selected day.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Test Caller into the caller name field
Fill Test Org into the organization field
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Fill Test Device into the device field
Fill Printer not working into the support request field
Fill Added via UI test into the notes field
Adjust date and time for the call to a valid value
Submit the form to log the call
Verify a new call is listed for the selected day

title: Call intake validation blocks submission when a required field is empty
description: Verifies required field validation prevents creating a call when a mandatory input is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Test Caller into the caller name field
Fill Test Org into the organization field
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Leave the support request field empty
Submit the form to log the call
Verify a validation error is visible preventing submission

title: Organization autocomplete: select a suggestion and save call with resolved organization
description: Verifies organization autocomplete selection can be used to populate the organization field and the saved record reflects that organization.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Test Caller into the caller name field
Type a partial organization name into the organization field to trigger suggestions
Select a suggested organization from the autocomplete list
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Fill Network access request into the support request field
Submit the form to log the call
Verify the new call is listed with the selected organization name

title: Clear the call intake form resets entered values
description: Verifies clearing the form removes user-entered data from required/optional fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Test Caller into the caller name field
Fill Test Org into the organization field
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Fill Password reset request into the support request field
Clear the form
Verify the call intake fields are empty

title: Change day and open an entry for details
description: Verifies navigating days updates the entries list and an entry can be opened for details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill History Caller into the caller name field
Fill History Org into the organization field
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Fill Email not syncing into the support request field
Submit the form to log the call
Change selected day with arrows or Today
Change selected day with arrows or Today to return to the day containing the new call
Open an entry from the entries list for details
Verify call details are displayed for the opened entry

title: Calendar modal: pick a date and show empty list when no calls exist
description: Verifies selecting a date via the calendar modal with no saved calls results in an empty entries list state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open calendar modal and pick a date
Verify the entries list for the selected day is empty

title: Day navigation updates entries list to reflect selected day
description: Verifies using day navigation controls updates the visible list of entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Day A Caller into the caller name field
Fill Day A Org into the organization field
Fill a valid telephone number into the telephone field
Fill VPN setup into the support request field
Submit the form to log the call
Change selected day with arrows or Today
Verify the entries list updates to reflect the newly selected day

title: Today control returns to current day after navigating away
description: Verifies the Today control returns the calendar selection to the current day and updates the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Change selected day with arrows or Today to move away from the current day
Change selected day with arrows or Today using the Today control
Verify the selected day is the current day
Verify the entries list corresponds to the current day

title: Search filters entries for the selected day
description: Verifies that searching narrows the visible call entries within the currently selected day and can be closed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open search
Type a query using a substring from a visible call entry into the search field
Verify only call entries matching the query are displayed for the selected day
Close search
Verify the full unfiltered list for the selected day is displayed

title: Search shows no-results state when query has no matches
description: Verifies that entering a query with no matches shows a no-results state scoped to the selected day.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open search
Type a unique query unlikely to exist into the search field
Verify a no-results state is displayed for the selected day
Close search
Verify the list view for the selected day is displayed

title: Search updates results as the query changes
description: Verifies that modifying the query changes the filtered results accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open search
Type a query using a substring from a visible call entry into the search field
Append additional characters to the query to make it more specific
Verify the displayed results are reduced or updated to match the refined query
Close search

title: Clearing the search query restores the full list while search remains open
description: Verifies that clearing the query removes filtering without requiring closing the search UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open search
Type a query using a substring from a visible call entry into the search field
Clear the search field
Verify the full unfiltered list for the selected day is displayed

title: Open entry, edit fields, save, and see updated entry in list
description: Verifies that editing a call entry and saving updates the entry shown in the list for the selected day.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an entry from the list
Change one editable field to a new value named Edit Save Test
Save changes
Verify the entry in the list reflects the updated value Edit Save Test

title: Attempt to save invalid data shows validation error and does not change record
description: Verifies that invalid edits are blocked with a validation error and the entry remains unchanged after closing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an entry from the list
Note a visible field value to compare later
Clear a required field or enter an invalid value
Attempt to save changes
Verify a validation error is visible
Close the entry editor without saving
Verify the entry in the list still shows the original value

title: Delete an entry with confirmation removes it from the list
description: Verifies that confirming deletion removes the selected call entry from the list for the selected day.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an entry from the list
Record a unique visible value from the entry to identify it later
Initiate delete
Confirm deletion
Verify the entry is removed from the list for the selected day

title: Cancel deletion keeps the entry in the list
description: Verifies that canceling the delete confirmation leaves the entry intact.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an entry from the list
Record a unique visible value from the entry to identify it later
Initiate delete
Cancel deletion
Close the entry editor
Verify the entry with the recorded value is still present in the list

title: Open statistics modal and close it
description: Verifies that the statistics modal opens from the toolbar, shows summary stats for the selected day, and closes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open statistics from the toolbar
Verify summary statistics for the selected day are displayed
Close the statistics modal
Verify the statistics modal is no longer visible

title: Statistics modal shows zero-data state when there are no calls
description: Verifies that when the selected day has no calls, the statistics modal displays an explanatory zero-data state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Change the selected day to a day with no call entries shown in the list
Open statistics from the toolbar
Verify a zero-data or explanatory message is displayed in the statistics modal
Close the statistics modal

title: Reports overlay opens and shows reporting UI state
description: Verifies the Reports overlay can be opened and displays either reporting controls or an unavailable state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Reports
Verify the Reports overlay is displayed
Verify either reporting controls are visible or an unavailable/misconfigured state message is visible

title: Run or refresh reports when controls are available
description: Verifies a user can trigger report refresh/run from the Reports overlay and see a completion outcome when controls exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Reports
If reporting controls are visible, trigger a refresh or run action
Verify report results are displayed or a confirmation of completion is visible

title: Reports unavailable state when backend reporting is not configured
description: Verifies the Reports overlay shows an unavailable/misconfigured message when reporting is not configured.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Reports
If an unavailable/misconfigured state is shown, do not attempt to run reports
Verify an unavailable or misconfigured reports message is visible

title: Reports overlay can be closed without changing app state
description: Verifies the user can exit the Reports overlay and return to the main shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Reports
Close the Reports overlay
Verify the main Call Log shell is visible

title: Account access requires sign-in when signed out
description: Verifies attempting to open Account while signed out results in a sign-in requirement prompt/message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open Account
Verify a prompt or message requiring sign-in is visible

title: Sign in and open Account profile page
description: Verifies a user can sign in and access the Account profile UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open Account
Verify the account profile fields are displayed

title: Update display name and save changes
description: Verifies a signed-in user can update their display name and see the updated value reflected in the UI after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open Account
Fill "Test Display Name" into the display name field
Save changes
Verify the display name field shows "Test Display Name"
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Cancel account edits does not persist changes in the form
description: Verifies canceling profile edits reverts the form to the previously loaded values.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open Account
Fill "Unsaved Name" into the display name field
Cancel changes
Verify the display name field does not show "Unsaved Name"

title: Toggle theme updates UI theme immediately
description: Verifies clicking the theme toggle switches the app theme in the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle in the title area
Verify the UI theme changes to the opposite mode

title: Theme preference persistence or graceful fallback on reload
description: Verifies theme preference either persists across reloads when supported or falls back gracefully without breaking the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle in the title area
Wait for the UI theme to finish updating
Navigate to /
Verify the UI remains functional and shows either the persisted theme preference or the default theme with graceful fallback

title: Organization autocomplete shows cached companies quickly before slow network
description: Verifies suggestions from persisted cached_autotask_companies appear within a short deadline while the edge function is artificially delayed.

steps.description: Seed cached_autotask_companies in localStorage and stub autotask search with a long delay
Sign in and type a two-character query that matches only the cached organization name
Verify the first autocomplete item is visible within CALLLOG_TEST_ORG_INSTANT_MAX_MS (default 900ms)

title: Account Security tab shows password and session controls
description: Verifies the Security tab exposes new-password fields, update action, and Sign out everywhere.

steps.description: Sign in
Open Account and select Security tab
Password and session controls are visible

title: Account Escape key returns to Call Log
description: Verifies Escape leaves the Account view and restores the main workspace.

steps.description: Sign in and open Account
Press Escape
Main Call Log workspace is visible

title: Account password mismatch shows validation error
description: Verifies mismatched new passwords show a client-side error without changing the account password.

steps.description: Sign in, Account, Security tab
Enter two different new passwords and submit
Validation error mentions passwords do not match

title: Titlebar Call Log back control on Account view
description: Verifies the titlebar back button appears on Account and hides Profile; reverses on return.

steps.description: Sign in; open Account
Call Log titlebar control visible; Account button hidden
Click Call Log in titlebar
Account button visible again

title: Administration tab when CALLLOG_TEST_EXPECT_ADMIN is set
description: Optional: with CALLLOG_TEST_EXPECT_ADMIN=1 and an admin user, Administration tab shows invite and user table.

steps.description: Set CALLLOG_TEST_EXPECT_ADMIN=1 (optional)
Sign in as admin; open Account; Administration tab
Invite email field and users table region are visible
